series_metadata.series_title: Private Investigator Security Guard Licensee File
series_metadata.series_description: Contains original and renewal applications, photo identification, SSN, character references, any subsequent new/replacement qualifying agent applications, name/address change requests, and supporting documentation. May also contain fire-arm bearer application.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: current, four years following date of lapse, expiration, or termination of license. ; Electronic: current, four years following date of lapse, expiration, or termination of license
